items.title: West Indies slight favourites as Pakistan hope for Test turnaround
items.summary: Rain could be a factor at the Brian Lara Cricket Academy, which is set to become the 13th venue to host a Test in the West Indies
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.

items.title: Germany appoint Jurgen Klopp as coach, former Liverpool boss threatens to ‘quit’ if media ‘behaves badly’
items.summary: Jurgen Klopp appointed Germany's coach after the FIFA World Cup 2026 debacle.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Devlin opens up on 'too stressful' Hearts exit for Rangers
items.summary: Cammy Devlin says it was "too stressful" to head to the World Cup with his club future still to be decided - although the extra time taken did lead to a move to Rangers.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.
